verses.latin_vulgate: Et factum est, duodecimo anno, in mense duodecimo, in una mensis : factum est verbum Domini ad me, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי֙ בִּשְׁתֵּ֣י עֶשְׂרֵ֣ה שָׁנָ֔ה בִּשְׁנֵֽי־עָשָׂ֥ר חֹ֖דֶשׁ בְּאֶחָ֣ד לַחֹ֑דֶשׁ הָיָ֥ה דְבַר־יְהֹוָ֖ה אֵלַ֥י לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.king_james: And it came to pass in the twelfth year, in the twelfth month, in the first day of the month, that the word of the Lord came unto me, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Fili hominis, assume lamentum super Pharaonem regem Ægypti, et dices ad eum :   Leoni gentium assimilatus es,  et draconi qui est in mari :  et ventilabas cornu in fluminibus tuis,  et conturbabas aquas pedibus tuis,  et conculcabas flumina earum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־אָדָ֗ם שָׂ֤א קִינָה֙ עַל־פַּרְעֹ֣ה מֶלֶךְ־מִצְרַ֔יִם וְאָמַרְתָּ֣ אֵלָ֔יו כְּפִ֥יר גּוֹיִ֖ם נִדְמֵ֑יתָ וְאַתָּה֙ כַּתַּנִּ֣ים בַּיַּמִּ֔ים וַתָּ֣גַח בְּנַהֲרוֹתֶ֗יךָ וַתִּדְלַח־מַ֙יִם֙ בְּרַגְלֶ֔יךָ וַתִּרְפֹּ֖ס נַהֲרוֹתָֽם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Son of man, take up a lamentation for Pharaoh king of Egypt, and say unto him, Thou art like a young lion of the nations, and thou art as a whale in the seas: and thou camest forth with thy rivers, and troubledst the waters with thy feet, and fouledst their rivers.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propterea hæc dicit Dominus Deus :  Expandam super te rete meum in multitudine populorum multorum,  et extraham te in sagena mea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֤ה אָמַר֙ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֔ה וּפָרַשְׂתִּ֤י עָלֶ֙יךָ֙ אֶת־רִשְׁתִּ֔י בִּקְהַ֖ל עַמִּ֣ים רַבִּ֑ים וְהֶעֱל֖וּךָ בְּחֶרְמִֽי׃
verses.king_james: Thus saith the Lord God; I will therefore spread out my net over thee with a company of many people; and they shall bring thee up in my net.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et projiciam te in terram ;  super faciem agri abjiciam te :  et habitare faciam super te omnia volatilia cæli,  et saturabo de te bestias universæ terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּנְטַשְׁתִּ֣יךָ בָאָ֔רֶץ עַל־פְּנֵ֥י הַשָּׂדֶ֖ה אֲטִילֶ֑ךָ וְהִשְׁכַּנְתִּ֤י עָלֶ֙יךָ֙ כׇּל־ע֣וֹף הַשָּׁמַ֔יִם וְהִשְׂבַּעְתִּ֥י מִמְּךָ֖ חַיַּ֥ת כׇּל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: Then will I leave thee upon the land, I will cast thee forth upon the open field, and will cause all the fowls of the heaven to remain upon thee, and I will fill the beasts of the whole earth with thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dabo carnes tuas super montes,  et implebo colles tuos sanie tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָתַתִּ֥י אֶת־בְּשָׂרְךָ֖ עַל־הֶהָרִ֑ים וּמִלֵּאתִ֥י הַגֵּאָי֖וֹת רָמוּתֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: And I will lay thy flesh upon the mountains, and fill the valleys with thy height.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et irrigabo terram fœtore sanguinis tui super montes,  et valles implebuntur ex te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִשְׁקֵיתִ֨י אֶ֧רֶץ צָפָֽתְךָ֛ מִדָּמְךָ֖ אֶל־הֶהָרִ֑ים וַאֲפִקִ֖ים יִמָּלְא֥וּן מִמֶּֽךָּ׃
verses.king_james: I will also water with thy blood the land wherein thou swimmest, even to the mountains; and the rivers shall be full of thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et operiam, cum extinctus fueris, cælum,  et nigrescere faciam stellas ejus :  solem nube tegam,  et luna non dabit lumen suum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכִסֵּיתִ֤י בְכַבּֽוֹתְךָ֙ שָׁמַ֔יִם וְהִקְדַּרְתִּ֖י אֶת־כֹּֽכְבֵיהֶ֑ם שֶׁ֚מֶשׁ בֶּעָנָ֣ן אֲכַסֶּ֔נּוּ וְיָרֵ֖חַ לֹא־יָאִ֥יר אוֹרֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And when I shall put thee out, I will cover the heaven, and make the stars thereof dark; I will cover the sun with a cloud, and the moon shall not give her light.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnia luminaria cæli mœrere faciam super te,  et dabo tenebras super terram tuam,  dicit Dominus Deus,  cum ceciderint vulnerati tui in medio terræ,  ait Dominus Deus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־מְא֤וֹרֵי אוֹר֙ בַּשָּׁמַ֔יִם אַקְדִּירֵ֖ם עָלֶ֑יךָ וְנָתַ֤תִּֽי חֹ֙שֶׁךְ֙ עַֽל־אַרְצְךָ֔ נְאֻ֖ם אֲדֹנָ֥י יֱהֹוִֽה׃
verses.king_james: All the bright lights of heaven will I make dark over thee, and set darkness upon thy land, saith the Lord God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et irritabo cor populorum multorum,  cum induxero contritionem tuam in gentibus super terras quas nescis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִ֨כְעַסְתִּ֔י לֵ֖ב עַמִּ֣ים רַבִּ֑ים בַּהֲבִיאִ֤י שִׁבְרְךָ֙ בַּגּוֹיִ֔ם עַל־אֲרָצ֖וֹת אֲשֶׁ֥ר לֹא־יְדַעְתָּֽם׃
verses.king_james: I will also vex the hearts of many people, when I shall bring thy destruction among the nations, into the countries which thou hast not known.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et stupescere faciam super te populos multos,  et reges eorum horrore nimio formidabunt super te,  cum volare cœperit gladius meus super facies eorum :  et obstupescent repente singuli pro anima sua in die ruinæ tuæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַהֲשִׁמּוֹתִ֨י עָלֶ֜יךָ עַמִּ֣ים רַבִּ֗ים וּמַלְכֵיהֶם֙ יִשְׂעֲר֤וּ עָלֶ֙יךָ֙ שַׂ֔עַר בְּעוֹפְפִ֥י חַרְבִּ֖י עַל־פְּנֵיהֶ֑ם וְחָרְד֤וּ לִרְגָעִים֙ אִ֣ישׁ לְנַפְשׁ֔וֹ בְּי֖וֹם מַפַּלְתֶּֽךָ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Yea, I will make many people amazed at thee, and their kings shall be horribly afraid for thee, when I shall brandish my sword before them; and they shall tremble at every moment, every man for his own life, in the day of thy fall.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia hæc dicit Dominus Deus :  Gladius regis Babylonis veniet tibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֛י כֹּ֥ה אָמַ֖ר אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֑ה חֶ֥רֶב מֶלֶךְ־בָּבֶ֖ל תְּבוֹאֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: For thus saith the Lord God; The sword of the king of Babylon shall come upon thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: In gladiis fortium dejiciam multitudinem tuam :  inexpugnabiles omnes gentes hæ,  et vastabunt superbiam Ægypti,  et dissipabitur multitudo ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּחַרְב֤וֹת גִּבּוֹרִים֙ אַפִּ֣יל הֲמוֹנֶ֔ךָ עָרִיצֵ֥י גוֹיִ֖ם כֻּלָּ֑ם וְשָֽׁדְדוּ֙ אֶת־גְּא֣וֹן מִצְרַ֔יִם וְנִשְׁמַ֖ד כׇּל־הֲמוֹנָֽהּ׃
verses.king_james: By the swords of the mighty will I cause thy multitude to fall, the terrible of the nations, all of them: and they shall spoil the pomp of Egypt, and all the multitude thereof shall be destroyed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et perdam omnia jumenta ejus,  quæ erant super aquas plurimas :  et non conturbabit eas pes hominis ultra,  neque ungula jumentorum turbabit eas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַֽאֲבַדְתִּי֙ אֶת־כׇּל־בְּהֶמְתָּ֔הּ מֵעַ֖ל מַ֣יִם רַבִּ֑ים וְלֹ֨א תִדְלָחֵ֤ם רֶֽגֶל־אָדָם֙ ע֔וֹד וּפַרְס֥וֹת בְּהֵמָ֖ה לֹ֥א תִדְלָחֵֽם׃
verses.king_james: I will destroy also all the beasts thereof from beside the great waters; neither shall the foot of man trouble them any more, nor the hoofs of beasts trouble them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tunc purissimas reddam aquas eorum,  et flumina eorum quasi oleum adducam,  ait Dominus Deus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָ֚ז אַשְׁקִ֣יעַ מֵימֵיהֶ֔ם וְנַהֲרוֹתָ֖ם כַּשֶּׁ֣מֶן אוֹלִ֑יךְ נְאֻ֖ם אֲדֹנָ֥י יֱהֹוִֽה׃
verses.king_james: Then will I make their waters deep, and cause their rivers to run like oil, saith the Lord God.

verses.latin_vulgate: cum dedero terram Ægypti desolatam :  deseretur autem terra a plenitudine sua  quando percussero omnes habitatores ejus :  et scient quia ego Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּתִתִּי֩ אֶת־אֶ֨רֶץ מִצְרַ֜יִם שְׁמָמָ֣ה וּנְשַׁמָּ֗ה אֶ֚רֶץ מִמְּלֹאָ֔הּ בְּהַכּוֹתִ֖י אֶת־כׇּל־י֣וֹשְׁבֵי בָ֑הּ וְיָדְע֖וּ כִּי־אֲנִ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: When I shall make the land of Egypt desolate, and the country shall be destitute of that whereof it was full, when I shall smite all them that dwell therein, then shall they know that I am the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Planctus est, et plangent eum :  filiæ gentium plangent eum :  super Ægyptum et super multitudinem ejus plangent eum,  ait Dominus Deus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קִינָ֥ה הִיא֙ וְק֣וֹנְנ֔וּהָ בְּנ֥וֹת הַגּוֹיִ֖ם תְּקוֹנֵ֣נָּה אוֹתָ֑הּ עַל־מִצְרַ֤יִם וְעַל־כׇּל־הֲמוֹנָהּ֙ תְּקוֹנֵ֣נָּה אוֹתָ֔הּ נְאֻ֖ם אֲדֹנָ֥י יֱהֹוִֽה׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: This is the lamentation wherewith they shall lament her: the daughters of the nations shall lament her: they shall lament for her, even for Egypt, and for all her multitude, saith the Lord God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et factum est in duodecimo anno, in quintadecima mensis : factum est verbum Domini ad me, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי֙ בִּשְׁתֵּ֣י עֶשְׂרֵ֣ה שָׁנָ֔ה בַּחֲמִשָּׁ֥ה עָשָׂ֖ר לַחֹ֑דֶשׁ הָיָ֥ה דְבַר־יְהֹוָ֖ה אֵלַ֥י לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.king_james: It came to pass also in the twelfth year, in the fifteenth day of the month, that the word of the Lord came unto me, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Fili hominis, cane lugubre super multitudinem Ægypti :  et detrahe eam ipsam, et filias gentium robustarum, ad terram ultimam,  cum his qui descendunt in lacum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־אָדָ֕ם נְהֵ֛ה עַל־הֲמ֥וֹן מִצְרַ֖יִם וְהוֹרִדֵ֑הוּ א֠וֹתָ֠הּ וּבְנ֨וֹת גּוֹיִ֧ם אַדִּרִ֛ם אֶל־אֶ֥רֶץ תַּחְתִּיּ֖וֹת אֶת־י֥וֹרְדֵי בֽוֹר׃
verses.king_james: Son of man, wail for the multitude of Egypt, and cast them down, even her, and the daughters of the famous nations, unto the nether parts of the earth, with them that go down into the pit.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quo pulchrior es ?  descende, et dormi cum incircumcisis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִמִּ֖י נָעָ֑מְתָּ רְדָ֥ה וְהׇשְׁכְּבָ֖ה אֶת־עֲרֵלִֽים׃
verses.king_james: Whom dost thou pass in beauty? go down, and be thou laid with the uncircumcised.

verses.latin_vulgate: In medio interfectorum gladio cadent ;  gladius datus est :  attraxerunt eam et omnes populos ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּת֥וֹךְ חַלְלֵי־חֶ֖רֶב יִפֹּ֑לוּ חֶ֣רֶב נִתָּ֔נָה מׇשְׁכ֥וּ אוֹתָ֖הּ וְכׇל־הֲמוֹנֶֽיהָ׃
verses.king_james: They shall fall in the midst of them that are slain by the sword: she is delivered to the sword: draw her and all her multitudes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Loquentur ei potentissimi robustorum de medio inferni,  qui cum auxiliatoribus ejus descenderunt,  et dormierunt incircumcisi interfecti gladio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְדַבְּרוּ־ל֞וֹ אֵלֵ֧י גִבּוֹרִ֛ים מִתּ֥וֹךְ שְׁא֖וֹל אֶת־עֹֽזְרָ֑יו יָ֥רְד֛וּ שָׁכְב֥וּ הָעֲרֵלִ֖ים חַלְלֵי־חָֽרֶב׃
verses.king_james: The strong among the mighty shall speak to him out of the midst of hell with them that help him: they are gone down, they lie uncircumcised, slain by the sword.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ibi Assur, et omnis multitudo ejus :  in circuitu illius sepulchra ejus,  omnes interfecti, et qui ceciderunt gladio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁ֤ם אַשּׁוּר֙ וְכׇל־קְהָלָ֔הּ סְבִיבוֹתָ֖יו קִבְרֹתָ֑יו כֻּלָּ֣ם חֲלָלִ֔ים הַנֹּפְלִ֖ים בֶּחָֽרֶב׃
verses.king_james: Asshur is there and all her company: his graves are about him: all of them slain, fallen by the sword:

verses.latin_vulgate: Quorum data sunt sepulchra in novissimis laci,  et facta est multitudo ejus per gyrum sepulchri ejus :  universi interfecti, cadentesque gladio,  qui dederant quondam formidinem in terra viventium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲשֶׁ֨ר נִתְּנ֤וּ קִבְרֹתֶ֙יהָ֙ בְּיַרְכְּתֵי־ב֔וֹר וַיְהִ֣י קְהָלָ֔הּ סְבִיב֖וֹת קְבֻרָתָ֑הּ כֻּלָּ֤ם חֲלָלִים֙ נֹפְלִ֣ים בַּחֶ֔רֶב אֲשֶׁר־נָתְנ֥וּ חִתִּ֖ית בְּאֶ֥רֶץ חַיִּֽים׃
verses.king_james: Whose graves are set in the sides of the pit, and her company is round about her grave: all of them slain, fallen by the sword, which caused terror in the land of the living.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ibi Ælam, et omnis multitudo ejus per gyrum sepulchri sui :  omnes hi interfecti, ruentesque gladio,  qui descenderunt incircumcisi ad terram ultimam ;  qui posuerunt terrorem suum in terra viventium,  et portaverunt ignominiam suam cum his qui descendunt in lacum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁ֤ם עֵילָם֙ וְכׇל־הֲמוֹנָ֔הּ סְבִיב֖וֹת קְבֻרָתָ֑הּ כֻּלָּ֣ם חֲלָלִים֩ הַנֹּפְלִ֨ים בַּחֶ֜רֶב אֲֽשֶׁר־יָרְד֥וּ עֲרֵלִ֣ים ׀ אֶל־אֶ֣רֶץ תַּחְתִּיּ֗וֹת אֲשֶׁ֨ר נָתְנ֤וּ חִתִּיתָם֙ בְּאֶ֣רֶץ חַיִּ֔ים וַיִּשְׂא֥וּ כְלִמָּתָ֖ם אֶת־י֥וֹרְדֵי בֽוֹר׃
verses.king_james: There is Elam and all her multitude round about her grave, all of them slain, fallen by the sword, which are gone down uncircumcised into the nether parts of the earth, which caused their terror in the land of the living; yet have they borne their shame with them that go down to the pit.

verses.latin_vulgate: In medio interfectorum  posuerunt cubile ejus in universis populis ejus :  in circuitu ejus sepulchrum illius :  omnes hi incircumcisi, interfectique gladio.  Dederunt enim terrorem suum in terra viventium,  et portaverunt ignominiam suam cum his qui descendunt in lacum :  in medio interfectorum positi sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּת֣וֹךְ חֲ֠לָלִ֠ים נָתְנ֨וּ מִשְׁכָּ֥ב לָהּ֙ בְּכׇל־הֲמוֹנָ֔הּ סְבִיבוֹתָ֖יו קִבְרֹתֶ֑הָ כֻּלָּ֣ם עֲרֵלִ֣ים חַלְלֵי־חֶ֡רֶב כִּֽי־נִתַּ֨ן חִתִּיתָ֜ם בְּאֶ֣רֶץ חַיִּ֗ים וַיִּשְׂא֤וּ כְלִמָּתָם֙ אֶת־י֣וֹרְדֵי ב֔וֹר בְּת֥וֹךְ חֲלָלִ֖ים נִתָּֽן׃
verses.king_james: They have set her a bed in the midst of the slain with all her multitude: her graves are round about him: all of them uncircumcised, slain by the sword: though their terror was caused in the land of the living, yet have they borne their shame with them that go down to the pit: he is put in the midst of them that be slain.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ibi Mosoch et Thubal, et omnis multitudo ejus :  in circuitu ejus sepulchra illius :  omnes hi incircumcisi, interfectique et cadentes gladio,  quia dederunt formidinem suam in terra viventium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁ֣ם מֶ֤שֶׁךְ תֻּבַל֙ וְכׇל־הֲמוֹנָ֔הּ סְבִיבוֹתָ֖יו קִבְרוֹתֶ֑יהָ כֻּלָּ֤ם עֲרֵלִים֙ מְחֻ֣לְלֵי חֶ֔רֶב כִּי־נָתְנ֥וּ חִתִּיתָ֖ם בְּאֶ֥רֶץ חַיִּֽים׃
verses.king_james: There is Meshech, Tubal, and all her multitude: her graves are round about him: all of them uncircumcised, slain by the sword, though they caused their terror in the land of the living.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et non dormient cum fortibus,  cadentibusque, et incircumcisis,  qui descenderunt ad infernum cum armis suis,  et posuerunt gladios suos sub capitibus suis,  et fuerunt iniquitates eorum in ossibus eorum :  quia terror fortium facti sunt in terra viventium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹ֤א יִשְׁכְּבוּ֙ אֶת־גִּבּוֹרִ֔ים נֹפְלִ֖ים מֵעֲרֵלִ֑ים אֲשֶׁ֣ר יָרְדֽוּ־שְׁא֣וֹל בִּכְלֵֽי־מִלְחַמְתָּם֩ וַיִּתְּנ֨וּ אֶת־חַרְבוֹתָ֜ם תַּ֣חַת רָאשֵׁיהֶ֗ם וַתְּהִ֤י עֲוֺֽנֹתָם֙ עַל־עַצְמוֹתָ֔ם כִּֽי־חִתִּ֥ית גִּבּוֹרִ֖ים בְּאֶ֥רֶץ חַיִּֽים׃
verses.king_james: And they shall not lie with the mighty that are fallen of the uncircumcised, which are gone down to hell with their weapons of war: and they have laid their swords under their heads, but their iniquities shall be upon their bones, though they were the terror of the mighty in the land of the living.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et tu ergo in medio incircumcisorum contereris,  et dormies cum interfectis gladio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֗ה בְּת֧וֹךְ עֲרֵלִ֛ים תִּשָּׁבַ֥ר וְתִשְׁכַּ֖ב אֶת־חַלְלֵי־חָֽרֶב׃
verses.king_james: Yea, thou shalt be broken in the midst of the uncircumcised, and shalt lie with them that are slain with the sword.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ibi Idumæa, et reges ejus, et omnes duces ejus,  qui dati sunt cum exercitu suo cum interfectis gladio,  et qui cum incircumcisis dormierunt,  et cum his qui descendunt in lacum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁ֣מָּה אֱד֗וֹם מְלָכֶ֙יהָ֙ וְכׇל־נְשִׂיאֶ֔יהָ אֲשֶׁר־נִתְּנ֥וּ בִגְבוּרָתָ֖ם אֶת־חַלְלֵי־חָ֑רֶב הֵ֛מָּה אֶת־עֲרֵלִ֥ים יִשְׁכָּ֖בוּ וְאֶת־יֹ֥רְדֵי בֽוֹר׃
verses.king_james: There is Edom, her kings, and all her princes, which with their might are laid by them that were slain by the sword: they shall lie with the uncircumcised, and with them that go down to the pit.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ibi principes aquilonis omnes, et universi venatores,  qui deducti sunt cum interfectis, paventes,  et in sua fortitudine confusi :  qui dormierunt incircumcisi  cum interfectis gladio,  et portaverunt confusionem suam  cum his qui descendunt in lacum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁ֣מָּה נְסִיכֵ֥י צָפ֛וֹן כֻּלָּ֖ם וְכׇל־צִדֹנִ֑י אֲשֶׁר־יָרְד֣וּ אֶת־חֲלָלִ֗ים בְּחִתִּיתָ֤ם מִגְֿבֽוּרָתָם֙ בּוֹשִׁ֔ים וַיִּשְׁכְּב֤וּ עֲרֵלִים֙ אֶת־חַלְלֵי־חֶ֔רֶב וַיִּשְׂא֥וּ כְלִמָּתָ֖ם אֶת־י֥וֹרְדֵי בֽוֹר׃
verses.king_james: There be the princes of the north, all of them, and all the Zidonians, which are gone down with the slain; with their terror they are ashamed of their might; and they lie uncircumcised with them that be slain by the sword, and bear their shame with them that go down to the pit.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vidit eos Pharao, et consolatus est  super universa multitudine sua,  quæ interfecta est gladio :  Pharao, et omnis exercitus ejus,  ait Dominus Deus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אוֹתָם֙ יִרְאֶ֣ה פַרְעֹ֔ה וְנִחַ֖ם עַל־כׇּל־הֲמוֹנֹ֑ה חַלְלֵי־חֶ֙רֶב֙ פַּרְעֹ֣ה וְכׇל־חֵיל֔וֹ נְאֻ֖ם אֲדֹנָ֥י יֱהֹוִֽה׃
verses.king_james: Pharaoh shall see them, and shall be comforted over all his multitude, even Pharaoh and all his army slain by the sword, saith the Lord God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia dedi terrorem meum in terra viventium,  et dormivit in medio incircumcisorum cum interfectis gladio :  Pharao, et omnis multitudo ejus,  ait Dominus Deus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־נָתַ֥תִּי אֶת־[חִתִּיתִ֖י] (חתיתו) בְּאֶ֣רֶץ חַיִּ֑ים וְהֻשְׁכַּב֩ בְּת֨וֹךְ עֲרֵלִ֜ים אֶת־חַלְלֵי־חֶ֗רֶב פַּרְעֹה֙ וְכׇל־הֲמוֹנֹ֔ה נְאֻ֖ם אֲדֹנָ֥י יֱהֹוִֽה׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: For I have caused my terror in the land of the living: and he shall be laid in the midst of the uncircumcised with them that are slain with the sword, even Pharaoh and all his multitude, saith the Lord God.
